name: skill-extractor
description: Extracts a learning into a reusable skill following Agent Skills spec

skill_name.description: Name of the skill (lowercase, hyphens for spaces)

description.description: Concise description of what the skill does

learning_id.description: Original learning ID this skill is extracted from

output_dir.description: Output directory for the skill (relative path)

dry_run.description: Show what would be created without creating files
